evidence.quote: Iberdrola , one of the world’s largest utility companies, has embraced cutting-edge AI technology to revolutionize its IT operations in ServiceNow . “At Iberdrola, we’re extending our production AI platform with a new agentic capability powered by Amazon Bedrock AgentCore,” says Iñigo Gutierrez, AI Global Expert Engineer at Iberdrola.
